name: Sakura Blossom
description: A delicate blend of cherry blossom, white tea, and subtle hints of sweet vanilla. Perfect for bringing the gentle spirit of spring into your home.

name: Matcha Morning
description: Earthy, calming, and softly sweet. Our Matcha Morning candle combines the aroma of roasted green tea with warm milk and a touch of honey.

name: Yuzu Citrus
description: Bright, uplifting, and refreshing. The crisp scent of Japanese yuzu citrus paired with sparkling grapefruit and a hint of mint.

name: Hinoki Wood
description: Grounding and serene. The woody, resinous aroma of Japanese cypress (hinoki) mixed with sandalwood and soft musk.

name: Plum Wine (Umeshu)
description: Sweet, tart, and deeply comforting. Inspired by traditional Japanese plum wine, featuring notes of dark plum, apricot, and subtle spices.

name: Moonlit Bamboo
description: A tranquil blend of fresh bamboo stalks, watery aloe, and night-blooming jasmine. Calming and airy.
